name: Big Simple Heart
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: one large bold heart centered on the page, smooth rounded curves and a clean simple shape with plenty of open space inside, no extra details, easy for little hands

name: Cute Kawaii Heart
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: a plump cartoon heart with a happy kawaii face, two big sparkly eyes, rosy cheeks, a cheerful smile, and tiny little arms waving, looking adorable and friendly

name: Patterned Heart Design
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: an intricate heart-shaped mandala filled with symmetrical patterns, swirls, petals, teardrops, and small dots radiating from the center out to the heart's edge, detailed and balanced

name: Doily Lace Heart
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: a heart shaped like a delicate paper lace doily, with scalloped edges, cut-out flower and leaf patterns, and fine decorative holes throughout, like an old-fashioned valentine

name: Heart Balloons Bunch
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: a cheerful bunch of heart-shaped balloons of different sizes floating upward, their curly strings gathered and tied together at the bottom in a neat bow, a few small sparkles around them

name: Floral Heart Wreath
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: a heart outline formed entirely from a ring of blooming flowers, leaves, and little buds woven together into a wreath shape, with open space in the middle

name: Rainbow Hearts Scene
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: a big arching rainbow with a fluffy cloud at each end, lots of little hearts of different sizes raining and floating down from the rainbow, a few stars scattered in the sky

name: I Love You Banner Heart
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: a bold heart with a ribbon banner draped across the middle that reads I LOVE YOU in bubbly letters, small decorative swirls and tiny hearts in the corners

name: Heart Close-Up Pattern
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: a single large heart that fills most of the page, its inside divided into sections packed with mixed patterns like polka dots, stripes, zigzags, swirls, and small flowers, a decorative coloring challenge

name: Heart in Cupped Hands
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: two open hands gently cupped together holding a glowing heart resting in the palms, a few small sparkle lines around the heart to show it shining, warm and caring

name: Connect-the-Dots Heart
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: a dot-to-dot activity where small numbered dots placed around the page trace the outline of a heart when connected in order, with a few of the dots near the top already linked by a guide line

name: Stacked Doodle Hearts
subject: patterns/heart
prompt: a page filled with many overlapping hand-drawn hearts of all different sizes and styles, some plain, some with stripes, dots, swirls, or zigzags inside, arranged in a fun doodle collage
